# allAssets()

**Type Method**

Returns a filter that gets all assets in the assets group.

## Declaration

```swift
class func allAssets() -> ALAssetsFilter!
```

## Return Value

A filter that gets all assets in the assets group.

## Creating Filters

- **allPhotos()**: Returns a filter that gets all photos in the assets group.
- **allVideos()**: Returns a filter that gets all videos in the assets group.

items.description: Returns a filter that gets all photos in the assets group.
items.name: allPhotos()

items.description: Returns a filter that gets all videos in the assets group.
items.name: allVideos()
